title: Perform mushroom substrate process tasks
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform mushroom substrate process tasks demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for each process stage

pcs.text: Identify substrate process requirements with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify substrate process requirements with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify substrate process requirements with supervisor.

pcs.text: Select and prepare tools, equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare tools, equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare tools, equipment and machinery.

pcs.text: Report and fix faults or variations from required settings
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report and fix faults or variations from required settings?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report and fix faults or variations from required settings.

pcs.text: Identify site quarantine protocols, workplace and personal hygiene requirements and food safety requirements when preparing for substrate process stages

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site quarantine protocols, workplace and personal hygiene requirements and food safety requirements when preparing for substrate process stages.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards, and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with work, and minimise impact

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with work, and minimise impact.
